_publications._publicationTitle: Assessment of Mosaicism and Detection of Cryptic Alleles in CRISPR/Cas9-Engineered Neurofibromatosis Type 1 and

_contextSnippet: At the stage when we designed the target sites for our TP53 LOF model creation, tools for identifying swine Cas9 target sites were limited. Retrospectively, we discovered that MIT's CRISPR design tool masked some genomic regions.
resourceName: Massachusetts Institute of Technology's CRISPR design tool
details: Tool masked some genomic regions, limiting its effectiveness for identifying swine Cas9 target sites
